How It Works

We Buy & We Sell

It's pretty simple. You want something — we find it. You have something to move — we buy it. No middlemen, no runaround. Just real people who know the market.

Selling Something?
We Buy Your Heat

Send us a photo, the size, and the condition — we'll come back with a number the same day. We pay on the spot. No lowballing, no long back-and-forth. Clean pairs with OG boxes always help, but bring what you have and we'll talk.

NikeJordan BrandMoncler Chrome HeartsOff-WhiteSupreme Travis ScottBAPEFear of God Eric EmanuelCorteizGallery Dept
Looking for Something?
We'll Find It

Tell us the pair, the colorway, the size. We either have it in hand or we go and find it. Every piece gets authenticated before it leaves us — we've never sold a fake and that's not changing. We ship nationwide, so you don't have to be in New York to shop with us.

Two ways to shop — pick what works for you.

Browse and order through our online store, or reach out on Instagram and we'll handle it personally. Either way, same product, same guarantee.

Got Questions

Frequently Asked

The stuff people ask us most. If your question isn't here, just reach out — we're always around.

Authentication is the foundation of everything we do. We've been in this space long enough to know exactly what to look for, and every single piece gets checked before it goes out. If we're ever unsure about something, we don't touch it. Our whole business runs on trust — we're not putting that at risk for anything.

We ship nationwide. You can order directly through our online store, or if you'd rather keep it personal, DM us on Instagram and we'll handle it from there. Everything ships fully insured with tracking. We're based in NYC, so local meetups in the area are always an option too.

Same product, same quality, same guarantee — just two different ways to get there. The online store is great if you already know what you want. Instagram is better if you have questions first, need us to source something specific, or just prefer talking to a real person before buying. Both work.

Easy. DM us on Instagram or send a text with a photo, the size, and the condition. We'll get back to you with an offer the same day. If we're good, we set up a time to meet or you ship it to us. We pay immediately — no games, no delays.

Yes, and this is one of the main things people come to us for. Tell us exactly what you're looking for — the colorway, size, condition — and we'll go find it. We have a solid network built over years in this space. Just be patient with rare pieces — they take time and cost what they cost.

The resell market moves constantly. A price that's accurate today might be off by next week. Rather than post numbers that go stale, we give you a real quote based on where the market is right now. It's always fair and always based on actual data.

Reach Out

Let's talk.

Whether you're buying, selling, or just have a question — we're easy to reach. Based in NYC, shipping everywhere. We respond fast and we keep it real.
